# Bhavya Kansal

Official website: https://bhavyakansal.dev/

Bhavya Kansal is an AI Engineer, ML Researcher, and founder building real-world machine learning, computer vision, and multimodal AI systems.

## Profile
- Name: Bhavya Kansal
- Role: AI Engineer, ML Researcher, Founder
- Location: Patiala, Punjab, India
- Focus: AI/ML engineering, deep learning, computer vision, multimodal AI, production AI systems
- Organization: MultiModex AI
- Education: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (TIET)
